channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Slams Crypto Industry 'Nihilists' as Clarity Act Remains in Limbo
item.description: Several obstacles to the Clarity Act, which have remained unsolved for months, stand in the way of its passage before a looming deadline.

item.title: Bitcoin shoots above $72,000 as optimism grows over Middle East ceasefire
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu reportedly has signaled a willingness to negotiate with Lebanon.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Uplisted to NYSE as Ethereum Firm Expands Buyback Program to $4 Billion
item.description: Ethereum treasury giant BitMine Immersion Technologies upped its share buyback program to $4 billion and was uplisted to the NYSE on Thursday.

item.title: OpenAI Pauses UK AI Tech Team-Up With Nvidia Over Energy Costs, Regulation
item.description: OpenAI's planned Stargate project with Nvidia and Nscale aimed to deploy thousands of GPUs to support AI workloads in Britain.

item.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Launches Toolkit for Building Local, Offline AI Apps
item.description: Tether’s new toolkit lets developers build AI applications that run entirely on-device, marking an expanded push into decentralized AI.

item.title: Bithumb Files to Seize Bitcoin From Holdouts After $43B Blunder
item.description: The South Korean exchange is pursuing formal legal remedies to recover 7 BTC after voluntary return requests failed.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto’s Performance Q1
item.description: Q1 digital asset review: geopolitical conflict and Fed caution led to declines, but institutional flows and regulatory clarity returned in March, building a durable foundation for Q2

item.title: Nunchuk Launches Open-Source Bitcoin Tools for AI Agents With 'Bounded Authority'
item.description: Nunchuk releases open-source tools that allow AI agents to interact with Bitcoin wallets while keeping humans in control over spending.

item.title: Stablecoin volumes to reach $719T by 2035 as generational wealth shift speeds up crypto adoption
item.description: Massive transfer of wealth to younger, crypto-native users and rising payment volumes challenge dominance of Visa and Mastercard

item.title: Project Crypto is designed so once Congress acts, @SECGov & @CFTC are ready to implement the CLARITY Act. @SecScottBessent is right. It's time for Congress to future-proof against rogue regulators & advance comprehensive market structure legislation - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9aLVNzQk9xcWJlSjRtZUQtRGJMcjl1Mlg1T21peldWQWx0cWo3RVE3UHJySTRDT2dfRUdQQnpVMmRWMjRFbmFDZE84bWRYaUVvb3U1SWQ5YmlZZEZtbXVKM2NmUTBuUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Project Crypto is designed s…

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine uplists to NYSE, expands buyback authorization to $4 billion
item.description: The company holds nearly 4% of ether's (ETH) total supply, but shares have struggled alongside that crypto.

item.title: UK-led Operation Atlantic freezes $12M in crypto scam proceeds
item.description: Operation Atlantic, a joint US, UK and Canadian operation, froze more than $12 million tied to crypto approval phishing and identified over 20,000 victims.

item.title: 🐋 WHALE ALERT: Whale opens 20x leveraged shorts on Bitcoin and Ethereum worth $80M, per Lookonchain. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9oQnU4bThzQThKTm5IWGY1ZG1sYTRpVGl3NVVORXBLWXd3ZHRxQTBZcmVGcnVPNjhDN0RzSGFscl9IVEMwaTVVVGdyYWRhV291TmVUWTlsaWZyN3huRlpyOGN2cWE?oc=5" target="_blank">🐋 WHALE ALERT: Whale opens 20x…

item.title: Trump's World Liberty Financial borrowed millions from a protocol its own advisor co-founded
item.description: Onchain data shows WLFI deposited 5 billion of its own tokens as collateral to borrow stablecoins it then sent to Coinbase Prime, pushing a lending pool to 100% utilization and leaving depositors unable to withdraw.

item.title: BitMEX co-founder donates $5 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK party
item.description: Delo did not specify whether he made the donation in fiat currency or crypto, but he expressed support for a proposed U.K. government moratorium on political donations made in cryptoassets

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Operation Atlantic: How Public-Private Collaboration Is Freezing Millions in Crypto Scam Proceeds
item.description: Last week, Chainalysis joined a proactive joint operation co-hosted by the UK’s National Crime Agency (NCA), the US Secret Service,… The post Operation Atlantic: How Public-Private Collaboration Is Freezing Millions in Crypto Scam Proceeds…

item.title: Bitcoin price surfs US PCE inflation as trader keeps $80K BTC price target
item.description: Bitcoin avoids major volatility after the first of the week's two key US inflation reports, while a trader sees a "new upwards leg" coming for BTC price action.

item.title: Mike Novogratz spotlights Helios as $15 billion powerhouse in Galaxy Digital annual report
item.description: The company's Nasdaq debut was a turning point toward infrastructure-led growth in the digital economy, said Novogratz.

item.title: Binance adds prediction market to its app for millions of users
item.description: The integration covers gas costs to lower barriers for retail users. Binance doesn't operate the markets directly, instead providing access to a third-party application.

item.title: Trader loses $3M as leveraged Fartcoin position unwinds on Hyperliquid
item.description: Hyperliquid data showed a 145 million Fartcoin position unwound across wallets, with the platform redistributing about $849,000 in gains to opposing traders.

item.title: DOJ and CFTC seek halt to Arizona action against Kalshi
item.description: The US Justice Department and commodities regulator asked a federal court to block Arizona’s action against Kalshi, arguing federally regulated event contracts fall under CFTC jurisdiction.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) trades flat as index declines
item.description: Aave (AAVE) dropped 3.6% and Stellar (XLM) fell 2.7%, leading the index lower.

item.title: North Korean cyber spies are no longer just remote threats
item.description: North Korea’s crypto playbook now spans fake developers, conference contacts and major DeFi exploits reaching deep across the industry.

item.title: Meet the Anti-Trump Crypto Developer Running for Congress in Virginia
item.description: Ethereum developer Joe Schiarizzi says most pro-crypto lawmakers in D.C. “just want a check” and don’t actually understand the technology—or its potential.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent demands lawmakers to send the Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation to President Trump to sign into law. "Senate time is precious, and now is the time to act." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5ONGtkUnZzOWMzMzk4QzhxaHJERDAyN25ELVVRdWFZNlhpMkVpR25HUnVaQ3lpVjVHWXdtRUR4VWRMSThUSjdBQTZtODRDaW1PYnQxeXpXdlpHSGprSGJYcTdYd1Q5ZlE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secr…

item.title: Banks are treading carefully on stablecoins despite market growth, S&P Global says
item.description: Most U.S. lenders remain in a wait-and-see mode as deposit risks, regulatory shifts and new competition complicate strategy, according to the report.

item.title: The $21 billion AI bet: Meta and CoreWeave ink deal for NVIDIA’s next-gen superchips
item.description: Long-term agreement between Meta and CoreWeave signals growing demand for scalable AI compute and inference capacity.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Bessent says crypto is a "technology the world is adopting." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1jRHhJRVFFaWtaZkRKWm1OMm5yZDVMeTNPYUZNQTdwNW91eGJOUU1sZWNlQm16bmtaWUpEeW1zblM3czZaNWY5N1NsbUtSel9jQWE3OTRDYUNmbGlUa0ItSTJR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary B…

item.title: The Drift Protocol Hack: How Privileged Access Led to a $285 Million Loss
item.description: TL;DR On April 1, 2026, Solana’s Drift Protocol was drained of $285 million (over 50% of its TVL) in a… The post The Drift Protocol Hack: How Privileged Access Led to a $285 Million Loss appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: Bitcoin Depot discloses $3.7M BTC theft in cybersecurity breach
item.description: Bitcoin Depot said a hacker stole 50.9 BTC, worth about $3.7 million, after gaining access to internal systems linked to corporate wallets.

item.title: Crypto exchanges chase TradFi commodities market as pricing gaps persist
item.description: Crypto exchanges are seeking market share of TradFi trading venues, but tokenized commodities adoption is limited by pricing and liquidity concerns.

item.title: Tokenized perpetual swaps hit $31 billion weekly volume on commodities volatility
item.description: Commodities led the growth, with oil trading reaching $6.9 billion in weekly volume after geopolitical tensions, while stock perpetual swaps grew 908% to roughly $4.9 billion.

item.title: Gold, silver and oil drive 65,000% jump in commodity perpetuals
item.description: BitMEX said commodity perpetual swaps volume jumped from $38.1 million to $25 billion in Q1 as traders flocked to 24/7 gold, silver and oil exposure.

item.title: Morning Minute: Iran Wants Bitcoin to Let Oil Tankers Through the Strait
item.description: Iran may accept BTC for oil tanker passage through the Strait of Hormuz, while Morgan Stanley just helped drive a huge day for Bitcoin ETFs.

item.title: Fartcoin Leads Altcoin Slump With Double-Digit Drop
item.description: Altcoin volatility spiked as Fartcoin crashed 28% from its peak, while Hyperliquid recorded $84 million in liquidations.

item.title: Fartcoin's price crashed 50% after $145 million manipulation bet went wrong
item.description: The liquidation was so large relative to the order book that Hyperliquid's auto-deleveraging mechanism activated, forcibly closing profitable short positions on the other side of the trade to prevent the system from accumulating bad debt.

item.title: Bitcoin’s $80,000 bull bet just took over the market
item.description: Whales and options traders are betting on a massive BTC reversal toward $80,000 as a fragile Iran ceasefire fuels hopes for a supply squeeze and a breakout.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts say this must happen for BTC price to ‘continue rising’
item.description: Bitcoin needs to regain momentum with higher trading volumes for BTC to reclaim $80,000 as support and sustain the recovery.

item.title: Bhutan moves a further $23M in Bitcoin as holdings drop by 70%
item.description: Bhutan has moved another 319 BTC, taking the total to over 9,000 BTC since late 2024, and trimming its sovereign stash by around 70%.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls below key resistance as analysts clash over next move
item.description: Despite a geopolitical "risk-on" boost, crypto markets remain range-bound with BTC hovering at $71,200 while altcoins like MANA and AERO show strength.

item.title: BitMEX Co-Founder Ben Delo Reveals $5.4M Donation to Farage’s Reform UK
item.description: Delo’s donation to Reform UK comes amid a growing debate around the role of crypto donations in UK political funding.

item.title: South Korea court cancels Upbit suspension, citing regulatory gaps: Report
item.description: The decision closes a legal battle spanning more than a year, after Dunamu moved to overturn the sanction and halt its enforcement.

item.title: Stake your take across crypto, politics, sports, and more. Prediction Markets are now live, thanks to @predictdotfun’s seamless integration with Binance Wallet. Learn more 👉 binance.com/en/support/ann… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5PaW1ZS0RvTk1Od0hzNk94UDA4Nk5BRmFMMU9lVUViQUx1TW9lU2JpN3VRMkRqNEdkMzk1M200M3E0R1IxSktBb2tSZUtVYXZHWmxJblQtUkFBSjFt?oc=5" target="_blank">Stake your take across crypto, politics, s…

item.title: Bessent ramps up pressure on Congress to pass CLARITY Act
item.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the CLARITY Act is vital to setting clear rules for crypto, tokenized assets and decentralized exchanges, and that US leadership is at stake.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC sees one of its highest volume days, with just one penny of volatility
item.description: High yield structure keeps STRC pinned at par while enabling large scale bitcoin purchases.

item.title: Bithumb moves to seize assets over mistaken $8 million bitcoin dispute
item.description: On Feb. 6, staff mistakenly entered "BTC" instead of "KRW" in a promotion, crediting roughly 620,000 bitcoin worth over $40 billion.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF Draws In $31M on First Trading Day
item.description: The new fund launched amid a second straight day of outflows for Bitcoin ETFs, undercutting competitors with a 0.14% expense ratio.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF trails BlackRock with $30M in first-day inflows
item.description: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin ETF drew $30.6 million in first-day inflows, ranking second behind BlackRock’s IBIT as US spot Bitcoin ETFs clocked net outflows on Wednesday.

item.title: Dubai clarifies token issuance rules for RWAs and stablecoins
item.description: Dubai’s regulator issued new guidance placing token launches into three buckets, tightening disclosure and governance standards for stablecoins, RWAs and other digital assets.

item.title: Iran's crypto tanker tolls are the latest step in its sanctions‑busting trade network
item.description: The Iranian regime has been increasingly using cryptocurrency over the last few years to facilitate cross border oil trading, according to data from Chainalysis.

item.title: Everyone’s awaiting U.S. inflation figures, but bitcoin traders couldn’t care less
item.description: There’s a wide gap between how experts are viewing Friday’s inflation data and how the bitcoin market is pricing in the impending figures.

item.title: Bithumb launches legal action to recover 7 Bitcoin from payout error
item.description: South Korean crypto exchange Bithumb files for a court-approved asset freeze to reclaim 7 BTC remaining from a February payout error.

item.title: The ‘bottom is in’: Why Tom Lee says the Iran ceasefire is the starting gun for a massive bitcoin rally
item.description: The Fundstrat co-founder and largest corporate ether buyer on earth said the ceasefire means the worst is over. His company bought 71,252 ETH last week.

item.title: Coinbase has been named as a custodian for the @MorganStanley Bitcoin Trust. Institutional adoption continues, regardless of short term price effects. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1ZWmxpRVpmaUNrWDRxRFVaZVdQUkVoYS02U2VUeFcyQ1NEc0t6RDNtZ1BRQVZGVzduWWVQNUNXeGl1ejRuMzVGTHVLU1pWRmdqbFRuYlJVdHJlOWZQUktmaGJucWJUX00?oc=5" target="_blank">Coinbase has been named as …

item.title: Yuga Labs settles lawsuit against artists accused of copying its NFTs
item.description: Yuga Labs first filed a lawsuit in June 2022, accusing Ripps and Cahen of copying its Bored Ape Yacht Club cartoon ape images and selling lookalike NFTs.

item.title: Canary Capital submits application for US-based spot PEPE ETF
item.description: Canary Capital is preparing to launch an ETF tracking Pepe’s price, despite the token trading 85% below its December 2024 all-time high.

item.title: Anthropic loses early appeal over Pentagon ‘supply chain risk’ label
item.description: “In our view, the equitable balance here cuts in favor of the government,” said a panel of judges from the District of Columbia Court of Appeals.

item.title: 99.99% of Polymarket traders shouldn't quit their day jobs, data suggests
item.description: While nearly 16% of Polymarket users are in profit, only a tiny fraction have made gains large and consistent enough to entertain walking away from their day job.

item.title: Hi. Professional C/C++ programmer here. The open-source code I can find written by Adam Back and Satoshi Nakamoto don't look remotely similar. Back's code looks typical of academic Unix programmers who also hack their code to run on Windows. Satoshi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9lLUk1eHFTSDRwT2hzYVlZaXJVaWtacEJNLVlQOVhqc2dBUE9XTF9ndmJyWXpZWjZ1aFBHekFwUkh4d1RLaWZtVFg0a3VKTXkzNFQxMnM0REJGZkNNWGxiNzJpTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Hi. Professional C/C++ programme…
